pages.text: The $(item)Stable Skyseed$() — $(item)Leather$() and a $(item)Gold Ingot$() over two planks. Horses, and a chest that might hold a saddle.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A roofed three-stall stable with $(bold)horses$(), $(bold)donkeys$(), or — rarely — a $(bold)mule$() inside. A source of leather, and mounts for crossing between your larger islands.

$(bold)Check the chest$()$(br)There's a chest in the stable with a chance of a $(item)Saddle$() or $(item)Horse Armor$() — neither of which you can craft, so this is the main reason to make one. Made from $(item)Leather$(), a $(item)Gold Ingot$() and planks.
